description: Caloron sprint retro — collect feedback, analyse, write report
_note: Stage IDs (REGISTER:*) must be replaced after running ./register_stages.sh

stages._desc: Retrieve a JSON value by key

feedback._desc: Collect structured feedback from sprint issue comments

kpis._desc: Compute sprint KPIs from final DAG state

stages._desc: Analyze sprint feedback into themes, improvements, and learnings
Generate a sprint retro report in Markdown
Write text content to a file at the specified path
